headline: Republic Services Inc (NYSE:RSG) Q1 2026 Earnings Beat Overshadowed by Revenue Miss and Market Sell-Off
summary: Republic Services Q1 2026 earnings beat overshadowed by revenue miss, with shares down 7.8% in a month as cautious outlook and softer volumes fuel sell-off.
